level_signals: Owns full lifecycle of partnerships from sourcing through long-term success
Experience scaling partnerships within a technology company implied at mid-senior level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience scaling partnerships, deployments, or strategic programs within a technology company
Strong operator: able to take ambiguous initiatives and drive them to real-world outcomes
Proven ability to work cross-functionally with product, engineering, and external stakeholders
Systems thinker: builds processes that make programs repeatable and scalable
AI-native: uses AI tools to move faster and improve workflows
Deep motivation to apply AI to meaningful real-world problems in areas like healthcare, education, or accessibility

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working with nonprofits, educational institutions, or healthcare systems
Experience working in emerging markets or international environments
Demonstrated interest in AI's role in accessibility, education, or healthcare

scope.surface: High-impact real-world deployments of ElevenLabs across healthcare, education, and culture; partnerships with nonprofits, educational institutions, and healthcare systems
scope.business_model: B2B and mission-driven partnerships (nonprofits, healthcare, education)
primary_metrics_inferred: Scalability and repeatability of impact programs
Real-world outcomes in healthcare, education, accessibility
core_responsibilities: Build and scale high-impact, real-world deployments of ElevenLabs across healthcare, education, and culture
Work with partners including nonprofits, educational institutions, and healthcare systems to drive meaningful outcomes
Own the full lifecycle from sourcing and evaluation through deployment, adoption, and long-term success
Work across product, engineering, legal, and GTM to ensure partnerships translate into real-world impact and repeatable systems
Identify opportunities, move quickly, and build systems needed to scale impact globally

green_flags: Fully remote-global role with no office time requirement
Clear mission focus (healthcare, education, accessibility) with defined partnership types
Highly autonomous role with broad ownership across full program lifecycle
Company has strong funding pedigree ($781M raised, $11B valuation) and notable enterprise clients
Learning & development stipend and social travel stipend offered
No job titles policy signals flat, merit-driven culture
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for global remote candidates
No years of experience specified, making seniority and target level ambiguous
Role title 'Impact Strategy & Operations' is non-standard and scope may evolve significantly as team is being built
No job titles policy may make career progression tracking difficult
